mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'RUNNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as runningTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PAUSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pausedTasks FROM api_task

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalExecutions, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failureCount, SUM(CASE WHEN all_assertions_passed = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assertionSuccessCount, SUM(CASE WHEN all_assertions_passed = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assertionFailureCount, AVG(response_time) as avgResponseTime, MIN(response_time) as minResponseTime, MAX(response_time) as maxResponseTime FROM api_response WHERE execute_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${days} days'
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalAlerts FROM alert_record

SELECT CASE WHEN all_assertions_passed = true THEN 'PASSED' WHEN all_assertions_passed = false THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'NOT_ASSERTED' END as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM api_response WHERE execute_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND all_assertions_passed IS NOT NULL GROUP BY all_assertions_passed ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(execute_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as date, COUNT(*) as executionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failureCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 100, 2) as successRate, AVG(response_time) as avgResponseTime FROM api_response WHERE execute_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${days} days' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(execute_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT response_code::text as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM api_response WHERE execute_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${days} days' AND response_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY response_code ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT r.id, t.task_name as taskName, r.request_url as url, r.status, r.response_time as responseTime, r.execute_time as executeTime FROM api_response r LEFT JOIN api_task t ON r.task_id = t.id WHERE r.execute_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${days} days' ORDER BY r.execute_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT 1 as totalTasks, CASE WHEN status = 'RUNNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as runningTasks, CASE WHEN status = 'PAUSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as pausedTasks FROM api_task WHERE id = #{taskId}

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalExecutions, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failureCount, SUM(CASE WHEN all_assertions_passed = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assertionSuccessCount, SUM(CASE WHEN all_assertions_passed = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assertionFailureCount, AVG(response_time) as avgResponseTime, MIN(response_time) as minResponseTime, MAX(response_time) as maxResponseTime FROM api_response WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND execute_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${days} days'

SELECT CASE WHEN all_assertions_passed = true THEN 'PASSED' WHEN all_assertions_passed = false THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'NOT_ASSERTED' END as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM api_response WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND all_assertions_passed IS NOT NULL GROUP BY all_assertions_passed ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(execute_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as date, COUNT(*) as executionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failureCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*)::numeric, 0) * 100, 2) as successRate, AVG(response_time) as avgResponseTime FROM api_response WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND execute_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${days} days' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(execute_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT response_code::text as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM api_response WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND execute_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${days} days' AND response_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY response_code ORDER BY count DESC
